name: conduit-browser
description: A translucent multi-pane Electron browser with immediate scroll following, reliable address navigation, automatic post-settings resynchronization, reset recovery, and a simple Conduit alignment page.

scripts.check: node --check src/main-entry-v22.js && node --check src/main-v22-hooks.js && node --check src/main-entry-v18.js && node --check src/main-v18.js && node --check src/workspace-v21.js && node --check src/preload-v18.js && node --check src/page-preload-v18.js && node --check src/renderer/bridge-v22.js && node --check src/renderer/app-v21.js && node --check src/adblocker.js && node --check src/core.js && node --check src/tor-manager.js && node --check src/tor-bridge.js && npm test
